_comment: Per-domain allowlist of authoritative source origins. Used by scripts/lint-seeds.mjs and scripts/validate-proposal.mjs to validate that doc_reference URLs for tier 1 and tier 2 chunks point at trusted sources. Tier 0 chunks may reference off-allowlist sources with only a warning. Entries are hostnames (no scheme, no path). Subdomains are exact-matched: 'docs.python.org' does not match 'python.org' and vice versa. To add a domain, append a key; to open the domain to contributions, populate its array. CODEOWNERS should require maintainer review on changes to this file. See DOMAIN_EXPANSION.md for the governance model.

tier_overrides._comment: Default tier for each domain, used by validate-proposal when a chunk omits domain_tier. Chunks may still set their own tier explicitly. Domains not listed here default to tier 0.
